name: feishu-bot-codex
description: Bridge the current Codex/Claude TUI session to a dedicated Feishu bot. Provides /bot-new, /bot-start, /bot-stop, /bot-list, /bot-config, /bot-remove.

interface.shortDescription: Mirror this TUI session to a dedicated Feishu bot
interface.longDescription: Slash commands to bind the current project to a Feishu bot, start/stop the mirror, list bindings, etc. Works inside both Codex CLI and Claude Code TUI. Requires the feishu-bot-codex daemon to be running.
